title: Echo of the Abyss
description: A mysterious and eerie dimension where darkness and frost reign
body:
Dive into Echo of the Abyss, a mysterious and eerie dimension where darkness and frost reign. Confront spectral horrors like the Abyssal Lurker and silent Spectral Creepers, and uncover powerful tools and armor forged from rare ores. Explore haunting biomes and brave the abyss for rewards beyond imagination.

**Feature Summary:**
- New Dimension: Echo of the Abyss—a shadowy world with three chilling biomes: Abyssal Forest, Phantom Plains, and Frozen Lands.
- Mobs: Beware the Abyssal Lurker with knockback and long-range vision, and the silent and deadly Spectral Creeper.
- Tools and Armor: Voidheart, Phantom, and Abyssium sets, each crafted with unique gems and ores from the depths.
- Biome-Specific Structures: Discover shrines, icy ruins, and hidden lore, revealing the secrets of the Abyss.
